title: paeonia peregrina var. officinalis
intro: Paeonia peregrina var. officinalis, also known as the white peony or bai shao, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Paeonia, native to Asia and widely cultivated for its medicinal properties. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Paeonia peregrina var. officinalis include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and even help to lower blood pressure. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
